base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of maze_flash_end_of_level — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1980 pac man. End-of-level maze-flash — after last dot eaten, maze walls alternate blue. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: End-of-level maze-flash — after last dot eaten, maze walls alternate blue→white rapidly (3-4 cycles over ~1s), creating celebratory flash before level transition. Sheet shows several color variants (blue/cyan/white/red) that cycle
